zh.lifeSummary: 當Bennie Ruth Griffith於1910年11月18日出生在美國德州丹頓皮洛特 波特時，她的父親David Phipps Griffith38歲，母親Rosa Cathryn Cartright38歲。她於1926年12月21日與Alfred Frank Greer在美國阿肯色州波爾克結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她於1935年住在美國阿肯色州且於1940年住在美國阿肯色州波爾克可福。她去世於1998年4月14日在美國俄勒岡州克魯克雷蒙享年87歲，埋葬在美國俄勒岡州克魯克雷蒙雷蒙 梅莫利亞爾 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Griffith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

variants.name: Griff
meanings: English: topographic name for someone living near a pit or hollow, from Middle English grif ‘pit, hollow, narrow valley’ (Old Norse gryfja), or a habitational name from Griff in Warwickshire, Griffe in Derbyshire, or Griff Farm in Rievaulx, North Yorkshire, all probably named with this word.
Welsh and English: from the Welsh personal name Gryff, a short form of Gruffudd. See Griffith .

variants.name: Kerfoot
meanings: habitational name, probably from Carefoot, near Myerscough (Lancashire).

variants.name: Griffiths
meanings: Welsh (Glamorgan and western England): Anglicized form of the patronymic (ap) Gruffudd, from Old Welsh Grippiud (see Griffith ).

nameMeanings.name: Bennie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Benjamin  , or less commonly of   Benedict   or   Bennett .  Since the mid-1980s it has also been very popular as an independent given name.

variants.name: Benjamin
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the youngest of the twelve sons of Jacob. His mother Rachel died in giving birth to him, and in her last moments she named him Benoni, meaning ‘son of my sorrow’. His father, however, did not wish him to bear such an ill-omened name, and renamed him Benyamin (Genesis 35:16–18; 42:4). This means either ‘son of the right hand’ or more likely ‘son of the south’ (Hebrew yamin can also mean ‘south’), since Benjamin was the only child of Jacob born in Canaan and not in Mesopotamia to the north. Another tradition is that the second element of the name is a variant of the Hebrew plural noun yamim, which means ‘days’ but is used idiomatically to mean ‘year’ or ‘years’. The name would then mean ‘son of (my) old age’ and refer to the fact that Benjamin was Jacob's youngest child. In the Middle Ages the name was often given to sons whose mothers had died in childbirth. Today it has no such unfortunate associations and it grew enormously in popularity following the release of the film The Graduate ( 1967 ), in which Dustin Hoffman played the role of Benjamin Braddock . It is used in Scotland as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Beathan .

nameMeanings.name: Ruth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (of uncertain derivation) of a Moabite woman who left her own people to remain with her mother-in-law Naomi, and afterwards became the wife of Boaz and an ancestress of David. Her story is told in the book of the Bible that bears her name. It was used among the Puritans in England in the 16th century, partly because of its association with the English vocabulary word ruth meaning ‘compassion’. It has always been popular as a Jewish name, but is now also widespread among people of many different cultures and creeds.

historicEvents.title: First U.S. Primary Elections Held
historicEvents.description: The first U.S. primary elections were held in Oregon in 1911.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Gazette-Times - Primary  education: How Oregon blazed the way for primary elections

historicEvents.title: The Girl Scouts
historicEvents.description: Like the Boy Scouts of America, The Girl Scouts is a youth organization for girls in the United States. Its purpose is to prepare girls to empower themselves and by acquiring practical skills.

historicEvents.title: The FBI is Established
historicEvents.description: The Bureau of Investigation's name was changed to the Federal Bureau of Investigation to help citizens know that the Government is helping protect from threats both domestically and abroad.

historicEvents.title: 1950s Texas Drought
historicEvents.description: One of most intense, costly, and devastating droughts ever recorded in the state of Texas. The entire state was in a state of drought by the summer of 1951. Less than 30-50% of the normal rainfall was received during this period. The state was plagued with dust storms similar to those from the infamous Dust Bowl. The drought ended in a destructive manner throughout 1957; storms, hail, tornadoes, and deadly floods.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Texas Water Resources Institute - Texas Drought: Now and Then

historicEvents.title: The Civil Rights Movement Begins
historicEvents.description: The civil rights movement was a movement to enforce constitutional and legal rights for African Americans that the other Americans enjoyed. By using nonviolent campaigns, those involved secured new recognition in laws and federal protection of all Americans. Moderators worked with Congress to pass of several pieces of legislation that overturned discriminatory practices.

historicEvents.title: Troops are sent to Central High School
historicEvents.description: In September 1957, troops were sent to Central High school in Little Rock, Arkansas. The reason was that nine African American children were going to start going to this school and putting the new law of Brown v Board of Education into action. These nine children became known as the Little Rock nine.

historicEvents.title: The Department of Education
historicEvents.description: Department of Education was organized to guide the schools throughout the United States in what to teach and how to teach it. The Department also collects data on the schools to see where government focus needs to go.

historicEvents.title: LDS Portland Temple Announced
historicEvents.description: The Portland Oregon Temple was announced on April 7, 1984.

en.lifeSummary: When Bennie Ruth Griffith was born on 18 November 1910, in Pilot Point, Denton, Texas, United States, her father, David Phipps Griffith, was 38 and her mother, Rosa Cathryn Cartright, was 38. She married Alfred Frank Greer on 21 December 1926, in Polk, Arkansas, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She lived in Arkansas, United States in 1935 and Cove, Polk, Arkansas, United States in 1940. She died on 14 April 1998, in Redmond, Crook, Oregon, United States, at the age of 87, and was buried in Redmond Memorial Cemetery, Redmond, Crook, Oregon, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bennie Ruth Griffith est née le 18 novembre 1910, à Pilot Point, Denton, Texas, États-Unis, son père, David Phipps Griffith, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Rosa Cathryn Cartright, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Alfred Frank Greer le 21 décembre 1926, à Polk, Arkansas, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle a vécu à Arkansas, États-Unis en 1935 et à Cove, Polk, Arkansas, États-Unis en 1940. Elle est décédée le 14 avril 1998, à Redmond, Crook, Oregon, États-Unis, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterrée à Redmond Memorial Cemetery, Redmond, Crook, Oregon, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bennie Ruth Griffith am 18. November 1910 in Pilot Point, Denton, Texas, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater David Phipps Griffith 38 und ihre Mutter Rosa Cathryn Cartright 38. Sie hat am 21. Dezember 1926 in Polk, Arkansas, Vereinigte Staaten Alfred Frank Greer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. 1935 hat sie in Arkansas, Vereinigte Staaten und 1940 in Cove, Polk, Arkansas, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Sie starb am 14. April 1998 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Redmond, Crook, Oregon, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Redmond Memorial Cemetery, Redmond, Crook, Oregon, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bennie Ruth Griffith è nata il il 18 novembre 1910 nel Pilot Point, Denton, Texas, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, David Phipps Griffith, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Rosa Cathryn Cartright, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Alfred Frank Greer il 21 dicembre 1926, nel Polk, Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Vissuto a Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1935 e nel Cove, Polk, Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1940. Morì il 14 aprile 1998, nel Redmond, Crook, Oregon, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolta a Redmond Memorial Cemetery, Redmond, Crook, Oregon, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Bennie Ruth Griffithが1910年11月18日にアメリカ合衆国テキサス州デントンピロト ポイントで生まれた時，父David Phipps Griffithは38歳，母Rosa Cathryn Cartrightは38歳であった。1926年12月21日にアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ポルクでAlfred Frank Greerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1935年にはアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州に，1940年にはアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ポルクコブに住んでいた。彼女は1998年4月14日にアメリカ合衆国オレゴン州クルークレドモンドで87歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国オレゴン州クルークレドモンドレドモンド メモーイアル セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Pilot Point, Denton, Texas: 미국 텍사스 주 덴턴 피로트 포인트
ko.Redmond Cemetery, Redmond, Deschutes, Or: 미국 오리건 주 크룩 레드몽 레드몽 모리앨 세멧리
ko.San Luis Obispo, San Luis Obispo, Califo: 미국 캘리포니아 주 산 루이스 오비스포 산 루이스 오비스포
ko.White, Polk, Arkansas, United States: 미국 아칸소 주 폴크 휘트 타운시프
ko.lifeSummary: Bennie Ruth Griffith(이)가 1910년 11월 18일 미국 텍사스 주 덴턴 피로트 포인트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 David Phipps Griffith(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rosa Cathryn Cartright(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1926년 12월 21일 미국 아칸소 주 폴크에서 Alfred Frank Greer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 1935년도에 미국 아칸소 주에서, 1940년도에 미국 아칸소 주 폴크 커브에서 살았다. 그녀는 1998년 4월 14일 미국 오리건 주 크룩 레드몽에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 오리건 주 크룩 레드몽 레드몽 모리앨 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bennie Ruth Griffith nasceu em 18 de novembro de 1910, em Pilot Point, Denton, Texas, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, David Phipps Griffith, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Rosa Cathryn Cartright, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Alfred Frank Greer em 21 de dezembro de 1926, em Polk, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela viveu em Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América em 1935 e em Cove, Polk, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América em 1940. Ela faleceu em 14 de abril de 1998, em Redmond, Crook, Óregon, Estados Unidos da América, com 87 anos, e foi sepultada em Redmond Memorial Cemetery, Redmond, Crook, Óregon, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bennie Ruth Griffith родилась 18 ноября 1910 г. в местности пилот поинт, дентон, Техас, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени David Phipps Griffith было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Rosa Cathryn Cartright, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alfred Frank Greer 21 декабря 1926 г. в местности полк, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она жила в местности Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в 1935 году и в местности ков, полк, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в 1940 году. Она умерла 14 апреля 1998 г. в местности редмонд, крук, Орегон, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 87 лет и была похоронена в местности редмонд меморяль кеметири, редмонд, крук, Орегон, Соединенные штаты.

Se casó con Alfred Frank Greer el 21 de diciembre de 1926, en Polk, Arkansas, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos.
